mapper.select: SELECT * FROM credit_category WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO credit_category ( category_id, category_name, credit_value, remark, create_date, status ) VALUES ( #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{creditValue}, #{remark}, #{createDate}, #{status} )
mapper.delete: UPDATE credit_category SET status = 0 WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
